page_hero.title: Build Your Career in Professional Security
page_hero.subtitle: We are always looking for disciplined, motivated professionals to join Nigeria's most respected security organisation. If you have integrity, commitment, and the drive to protect — we want to hear from you.
page_hero.hero_image_alt: Male security operative in black jacket with sunglasses and earpiece, arms crossed

intro.title: Current Openings
intro.body: Click on any role below to pre-select it in the application form. We review all applications on a rolling basis.

jobs.title: Security Guards (ex military that was honourably discharged)
jobs.description: We are seeking ex-military personnel who have been honourably discharged to join our team as professional security guards. Applicants must be physically fit, disciplined, and committed to maintaining the highest standards of security.

jobs.title: Supervisor
jobs.description: Lead and coordinate teams of security operatives across client sites. Responsible for shift management, incident reporting, and quality assurance on daily operations.

jobs.title: Human Resources
jobs.description: Support the HR department in recruitment screening, onboarding, personnel records management, disciplinary procedures, and staff welfare. Security sector HR experience is a strong advantage.
requirements: BSc/HND in Human Resources or related field

jobs.title: Sales Executives
jobs.description: Drive new business acquisition for security contracts across corporate, government, and residential segments. Prepare proposals, negotiate contracts, and manage client relationships through the sales cycle.
requirements: Security or FM sector knowledge preferred

jobs.title: Marketer (must be a female that can drive)
jobs.description: Manage Blackstone's brand presence across digital and traditional channels. Must be female and hold a valid driver's licence. Responsibilities include social media management, content creation, email campaigns, and event coordination.
requirements: BSc in Marketing, Communications, or related field

jobs.title: Drivers
jobs.description: Provide professional driving services for executive protection assignments and company logistics. Must demonstrate defensive driving capability, local route knowledge, and absolute discretion.

form_section.title: Apply Now
form_section.subtitle: Complete the form below. All fields marked with * are required. Shortlisted candidates will be contacted within 7 working days.
position_options: Security Guards (ex military that was honourably discharged)
Marketer (must be a female that can drive)

items.title: HMO Coverage
items.body: Health insurance for you and your dependants.

items.title: Career Progression
items.body: Structured paths from operative to management.
